nasb.text: So also we, while we were children, were held in bondage under the elemental things of the world.

esv.text: In the same way we also, when we were children, were enslaved to the elementary principles of the world.

cnv.text: 我們也是這樣，作孩童的時候，被世俗的言論所奴役；

ccb.text: 我们也一样，当我们还是孩童的时候，我们受世界基本规条的辖制。

csbs.text: 我们也是这样：我们还是小孩子的时候，在世界的原则下受奴役。
